issue_body:
introduce a web-first assertion for Visual regression testing.

Today:

```js
expect(await page.screenshot()).toMatchSnapshot('foo.png');
```

After this:

```js
await expect(page).toHaveScreenshot('foo.png');
```

`toHaveScreenshot` should auto-retry screenshot until golden is reached.

`toHaveScreenshot` should also have:
- [x] hide field cursor
- [x] support locators
- ~disalbe css animations~ — https://github.com/microsoft/playwright/issues/11912
- ~mask out certain parts of screen? e.g. with selector~ — https://github.com/microsoft/playwright/issues/11913
pr_body:
open questions:
- [x] ~~currently we support toMatchSnapshot in the config, shall we mirror toHaveScreenshot there?~~ not for now
- [x] this impl does not allow custom screenshot options (fullscreen e.g.) any thoughts?
- [x] make it compatible with locators
- [x] determine the file extension correctly

Fixes https://github.com/microsoft/playwright/issues/9938
